name: Whisky Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 kilograms Plain chocolate, cut into small chunks
750 grams Unsalted butter at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 180°C.
2. Line two 20cm springform pans with baking paper and grease and flour the paper.
3. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
4. Melt the chocolate in a bowl over simmering water and set aside in a warm place.
5. Beat the butter until white and creamy, then gradually add 5 cups of caster sugar and continue beating until the mixture is fluffy.
6. Beat in the egg yolks one at a time, then add the whiskey and vanilla extract. Stir in the melted chocolate, then fold in half of the sifted flour, mix well, and fold in the remaining flour.
7. Beat the egg whites until soft peaks form, then gradually add the remaining cup of sugar and beat until the mixture is shiny and forms stiff peaks. Add a little of the chocolate mixture, then fold in the remainder.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared springform pans and bake for 1 hour.
9. Remove from the oven and turn the cakes out immediately onto a cake rack to cool. To serve: cut the cakes into wedges and place on each serving plate. Serve with clotted cream.
